children.heading: Report on Israel’s qualitative military edge (QME)
children.label: a Report on Israel’s qualitative military edge (QME)

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the President shall submit to the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate and the Committee on Foreign Affairs of the House of Representatives a report on the status of Israel’s qualitative military edge in light of current trends and instability in the region.July 27, 2012

children.heading: Substitution for quadrennial report
children.label: 2 Substitution for quadrennial report
children.text: If submitted within one year of the date that the first quadrennial report required by section 201(c)(2) of the Naval Vessel Transfer Act of 2008 (; note) is due to be submitted, the report required by paragraph (1) may substitute for such quadrennial report.Public Law 110–42922 U.S.C. 2776

Taking into account the Government of Israel’s urgent requirement for F–35 aircraft, actions to improve the process relating to its purchase of F–35 aircraft, particularly with respect to cost efficiency and timely delivery.
Efforts to expand cooperation between the United States and Israel in homeland security, counter-terrorism, maritime security, energy, cyber-security, and other related areas.
Actions to integrate Israel into the defense of the Eastern Mediterranean.
